archimate:Representation.name: RDF-S
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: RDF Schema provides a data-modelling vocabulary for RDF data. RDF Schema is an extension of the basic RDF vocabulary.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/rdf12-schema/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RDF-SRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RDF-SRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: RDF Schema provides a data-modelling vocabulary for RDF data. RDF Schema is an extension of the basic RDF vocabulary.
